title: × Acostitrapa subdiffusa
intro:
There is no information available on the plant × Acostitrapa subdiffusa. However, Acostitrapa subdiffusa is a synonym of  Acmadenia tenax (also known as Acmadenia subdiffusa), which is a species of shrub in the family Rutaceae. 

If we consider Acmadenia subdiffusa instead, it is a shrub native to South Africa, known for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Acmadenia subdiffusa include the potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health.

The bioactive constituents of Acmadenia subdiffusa include limonoids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. 

Acmadenia subdiffusa is used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and capsules.
